title: Tests re-declare all handlers instead of exercising app.go — production routes have ~3% coverage
evidence: app_test.go:16-178 setupTestRouter() rebuilds every route inline; app.go main()/initDB() and the registered handlers are never invoked by any test, so scores.json test_coverage=0.03 despite 10 passing tests (defect_rate=1.0)
suggestion: Extract route registration into a testable func (e.g. newRouter(db) *gin.Engine) in app.go and have the tests call it, so the shipped handlers are what gets exercised

title: PUT /books/{id} does full-replace with no validation — can blank required title/author
evidence: app.go:31-36 UpdateBookRequest has no binding:"required"; app.go:174-177 UPDATE sets all columns unconditionally, so a PUT omitting title/author overwrites them with empty strings
suggestion: Validate title/author on update too, or use COALESCE/partial-update semantics to preserve omitted fields
